description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a dark metallic finish and a prominent rail system along the top for mounting accessories. The stock is solid and angular, with a visible buffer tube and a compact, ergonomic shoulder rest. The handguard is ribbed for improved grip, and the trigger guard is large, accommodating gloved hands. A cylindrical magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a drum or rotary type. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a simple muzzle and no visible suppressor or brake. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A tactical, dark-finished rifle with a solid stock, ribbed handguard, and a cylindrical magazine beneath the receiver. The design is modern and robust, featuring a prominent top rail and compact barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the stock, rail, ribbed handguard, and cylindrical magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, buffer tube, and the alignment of the top rail and barrel.
